gauges.name: 50-day vs 150-day SMA
gauges.sub: Bear trigger: 50-day crosses below 150-day AND both flatten or slope down. The signal that historically tells you a bear is actually underway, not just feared.
gauges.detail: S&P ≈ 7,408. 50-day above 150-day (200-day ≈ 7,002); both slopes up. No death cross.
